 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75556054</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Spain: High-speed train crash leaves at least 21 dead]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-19T00:04:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-19T00:04:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/spain-high-speed-train-crash-leaves-at-least-21-dead/live-75556054?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[A high-speed train travelling from Malaga to Madrid derailed, crashing into an oncoming train near the town of Adamuz in the southern Andalusia region.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75553537</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Gaza board extended membership to cost $1 billion — reports]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-18T23:57:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-18T23:57:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/gaza-board-extended-membership-to-cost-1-billion-reports/a-75553537?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[According to media reports, the Gaza "Board of Peace" draft charter requires members to contribute $1 billion in cash to extend their membership.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75555184</id>
  <title><![CDATA[AFCON: Senegal snatches football cup from hosts Morocco]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-18T22:00:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-18T22:00:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/afcon-senegal-snatches-football-cup-from-hosts-morocco/a-75555184?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Senegal's Pape Gueye scored the decisive point in the fourth minute of extra time, after a goalless game that was briefly interrupted with a Senegal walk-off.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75545809</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Germany news: Syrian president puts planned visit on hold]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-18T19:22:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-18T19:22:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/germany-news-syrian-president-puts-planned-visit-on-hold/live-75545809?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[President Ahmad al-Sharaa has postponed his visit to Berlin, for talks with Chancellor Friedrich Merz, due to the political situation in his country. The repatriation of Syrian refugees was high on the agenda.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75509182</id>
  <title><![CDATA[WEF: Donald Trump set to dominate Davos 2026]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-18T18:14:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-18T18:14:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/wef-donald-trump-set-to-dominate-davos-2026/a-75509182?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Davos braces for Trump's return. Weeks after attacking Venezuela, capturing its controversial leader, and reviving Greenland ambitions, the US president's presence is expected to raise the stakes at WEF's annual meeting.]]></summary>
  <category term="Business"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75553804</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Syria announces new ceasefire deal with Kurdish-led SDF]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-18T17:07:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-18T17:07:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/syria-announces-new-ceasefire-deal-with-kurdish-led-sdf/live-75553804?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The deal follows advances by the Syrian military into northern and eastern areas previously under the control of Syrian Democratic Forces, or SDF. DW has the latest.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75503168</id>
  <title><![CDATA[8 fun facts about Dolly Parton for her 80th birthday]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-18T16:17:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-18T16:17:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/8-fun-facts-about-dolly-parton-for-her-80th-birthday/a-75503168?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Dolly Parton is one of the world's most successful artists. Now 80, she has an eventful life to look back over. Here are some important and extraordinary facts about the country icon.]]></summary>
  <category term="Culture"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75516554</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Hong Kong: Life sentence looms for media tycoon Jimmy Lai]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-18T16:15:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-18T16:15:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/hong-kong-life-sentence-looms-for-media-tycoon-jimmy-lai/a-75516554?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[With the last stage of Jimmy Lai's national security trial drawing to a close, Hong Kong's High Court is set to decide on the sentence for the pro-democracy tycoon. Will Lai get life in prison?]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75541520</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Germany: A push to reduce the number of federal states]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-18T16:14:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-18T16:14:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/germany-a-push-to-reduce-the-number-of-federal-states/a-75541520?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Bavaria's State Premier Markus Söder wants to change Germany's political map, but his proposal to merge federal states is meeting with resistance.]]></summary>
  <category term="Germany"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75553538</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Trump's Greenland tariffs: What you need to know]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-18T14:48:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-18T14:48:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/trump-s-greenland-tariffs-what-you-need-to-know/a-75553538?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Donald Trump's pursuit of Greenland now extends to new tariffs on countries considered NATO allies. But what would such tariffs mean for the European countries affected, how have they been received, and what happens now?]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75550031</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Greenland row: EU to hold emergency summit on Trump tariffs]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-18T13:39:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-18T13:39:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/greenland-row-eu-to-hold-emergency-summit-on-trump-tariffs/live-75550031?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[EU leaders will meet in the coming days after President Donald Trump threatened tariffs on eight countries in a dispute over Greenland. Plus, France wants the bloc to use its so-called trade "bazooka." Follow the latest.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75552564</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Russia strikes 6 Ukrainian regions, killing at least 2]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-18T12:55:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-18T12:55:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/russia-strikes-6-ukrainian-regions-killing-at-least-2/a-75552564?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Dozens of people were wounded and at least two were killed in overnight Russian air attacks on Ukraine, according to the Ukrainian president. The attack comes as US and Ukrainian officials are set to meet in Miami.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75551958</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Syrian army extends control in north, seizes gas, oil fields]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-18T12:03:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-18T12:03:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/syrian-army-extends-control-in-north-seizes-gas-oil-fields/a-75551958?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The Syrian army continues to push against the Kurdish-led Syrian Democratic Forces (SDF), reportedly capturing major oil and gas fields in eastern Syria.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75551698</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Austria: Eight people killed in three avalanches]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-18T09:17:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-18T09:17:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/austria-eight-people-killed-in-three-avalanches/a-75551698?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Officials said fresh snowfall in the Austrian Alps is poorly bonded to older layers on the peaks, increasing the risk of repeated avalanches, and urged extreme caution.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75453946</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Port Assab becomes flashpoint for Ethiopia–Eritrea relations]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-18T08:29:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-18T08:29:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/port-assab-becomes-flashpoint-for-ethiopia-eritrea-relations/a-75453946?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Addis Ababa's renewed calls for sea access threaten an already fragile relationship with Eritrea, drawing anger from Asmara.]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75544113</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Will Turkey export home-grown 'Islamic State' extremists?]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-18T06:35:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-18T06:35:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/will-turkey-export-home-grown-islamic-state-extremists/a-75544113?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Turkey is no longer just a transit country for one branch of the extremist "Islamic State" group. Experts say the group has become more professional in Turkey and could pose a danger domestically, and abroad.]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75533025</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Germany's AfD receives millions in public funding]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-18T06:00:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-18T06:00:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/germany-s-afd-receives-millions-in-public-funding/a-75533025?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[The right-wing extremist party Alternative for Germany (AfD) profits significantly from public funding. Is democracy in Germany funding its own downfall?]]></summary>
  <category term="Germany"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75551272</id>
  <title><![CDATA[US: Anti-ICE protesters clash with far-right group in Minneapolis]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-18T03:46:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-18T03:46:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/us-anti-ice-protesters-clash-with-far-right-group-in-minneapolis/a-75551272?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Right-wing influencer Jake Lang, who organized a pro-ICE rally, had announced that he intended to "burn a Quran" on the steps of City Hall. A much larger group of people chased him and his supporters off the scene.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75550023</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Israel objects to US lineup of 'Gaza executive board']]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-17T23:15:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-17T23:15:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/israel-objects-to-us-lineup-of-gaza-executive-board/a-75550023?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Netanyahu's office said the lineup runs contrary to Israeli policy. The Trump administration had announced panel members who will oversee the transitional government in the war-ravaged Palestinian territory.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75550678</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Japan: Popular Prime Minister Takaichi calls early election]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-17T20:55:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-17T20:55:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/japan-popular-prime-minister-takaichi-calls-early-election/a-75550678?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Japan's first female leader is popular with voters. She has now called for early elections to leverage their approval. The move could bolster her position, but it carries risks.]]></summary>
  <category term="World"/>
 </entry>
 <entry>
  <id>tag:dw.com,2026:75546625</id>
  <title><![CDATA[Thousands oppose US plans in 'Hands off Greenland' protests]]></title>
  <updated>2026-01-17T19:02:00Z</updated>
  <published>2026-01-17T19:02:00Z</published>
  <rights>2026 DW</rights>
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://www.dw.com/en/thousands-oppose-us-plans-in-hands-off-greenland-protests/a-75546625?maca=en-rss-en-top-1022-xml-atom"/>
  <summary><![CDATA[Organizers have called on Danish and Greenlandic residents to join marches and rallies against US President Donald Trump's push to acquire Greenland.]]></summary>
  <category term="News"/>
 </entry>
